title: Poem Lover
description: I love poems, so I want to see it every time
body:
When this mod is loaded, every time you jump into the Exit Portal (from the End to Overworld), you'll see the End Poem, no matter if it's the first time you've seen it.

Client only, as Mojang actually lets the client decide whether to see the portal or directly respawn.

This feature is enabled since March 32nd, 2024.
